working_on: Routine task SQA-01 (T-SEED-QA): Shard 01 QA census — score 28 pedagogical_prerequisite edges (C1 prerequisite soundness) + 20 nodes (C2 teaching_notes traction, C3 summary cold-readability) per the pinned seed_qa_audit.md rubric; shard content read from the committed seed_qa_evidence/shards.json (routine sessions never touch the DB); write the single scope-locked evidence file.
declared_scope: Author engine/build_readiness/seed_qa_evidence/shard_01.md as candidate-findings evidence for SQA-01: one C1 verdict (Sound | Defensible | Reversed | Weak-redundant) per the 28 pedagogical_prerequisite edges + C2/C3 yes/no per the 20 nodes, per the pinned seed_qa_audit.md rubric, following the fixed evidence-file schema. Candidate findings only — no Issue filing, no migration edits, no disposition. phase: NA-routine

scope_delivery.explanation: Delivered as declared — shard_01.md authored to the fixed evidence-file schema, all 28 edges + 20 nodes scored, no descope or reorder. No user confirmation (unattended routine session). One in-scope follow-up deliverable commit (a one-char punctuation typo fix to the E-4 metadata line) and one in-band Issue (#122, tech-debt — out-of-scope discovery, no tracked files touched). Lifecycle-push recovery mid-shutdown: a separately-committed mark-complete change plus the cosmetic typo commit left HEAD 2-ahead, refused by the deliverable wrapper; recovered non-destructively via git reset --soft origin/main + git restore --staged + git stash — no work lost. The mark-complete auto_target.json status flip rides with this close commit.

outcome_summary: First routine fire of the T-SEED-QA seed-graph QA census. Scored shard 01 — 28 pedagogical_prerequisite edges (C1) + 20 nodes (C2/C3) per the pinned seed_qa_audit.md rubric — and wrote seed_qa_evidence/shard_01.md. Findings: C1 3 Reversed/28 = 10.7% (E-5, E-24, E-26; all direction errors, none audit-touched — within range of the production audit's 13% baseline); C2 0/20 fail; C3 2/20 fail = 10% (N-4 jargon-gated, N-13 borderline circular). Candidate findings only — disposition is the SQA-20 closeout. SQA-01 marked complete; SQA-02 next. Filed Issue #122 (tech-debt): routine-mode-lifecycle SKILL step-10 standalone-(commit) wording traps the lifecycle-push wrapper (the auto_target.json status flip must ride with the close commit, not be a separate commit). Lesson drawer drawer_paideia_lessons_7f8c9b71f3531a941e8062da captures the wrapper commit-sequencing constraint plus the non-destructive recovery. 0 validator hard-fails (48 checks).
